channel.title: François Rochon — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by François Rochon (Giverny Capital) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: François Rochon: ADDED MA (+6%) · Q4 2025
item.description: François Rochon (Giverny Capital) added MA in Q4 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. Adding to 17-year Mastercard position.

item.title: François Rochon: ADDED V (+5%) · Q4 2025
item.description: François Rochon (Giverny Capital) added V in Q4 2025 · 9.8% of portfolio. Small Visa add.

item.title: François Rochon: ADDED META (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: François Rochon (Giverny Capital) added META in Q4 2025 · 6.2% of portfolio. Quality compounder add.

item.title: François Rochon: ADDED MA (+4%) · Q3 2025
item.description: François Rochon (Giverny Capital) added MA in Q3 2025 · 10.6% of portfolio. Mastercard add.

item.title: François Rochon: ADDED GOOGL (+10%) · Q3 2025
item.description: François Rochon (Giverny Capital) added GOOGL in Q3 2025 · 8.4% of portfolio. Adding Alphabet.
